post.title: Adding TypeScript to a Next.js App
post.excerpt: I'm rebuilding my blog off a starter. Step one: Add TypeScript.
post.content:
I forked [John Polacek](http://johnpolacek.com/)'s <Link external href="https://nextjs.org">Next.js</Link> blog starter to build this.
You can view and fork a starter based on my stack (which primarily adds typescript to the original) <Link external href="https://nextjs-mdx-themeui-ts-starter.erikdstock.vercel.app" >here</Link>.
